core_mechanism: post-selection (conditional) hypothesis testing: two-sample significance tests applied after a data-driven detection event, with guaranteed Type I error control, used to attribute a detected discontinuity to specific subsets of coordinates
brief_reason: The abstract proposes post hoc two-sample (nonparametric) testing procedures with theoretical Type I error guarantees to decide, after a change-point has already been located, which predefined blocks of coordinates carry the change.
